headline: Is It Time To Reassess Microchip Technology (MCHP) After Its Strong 2024 Share Price Run?
summary: Determining whether Microchip Technology at US$91.47 is offering fair value right now, or whether the price is getting ahead of itself, starts with understanding how its current valuation compares with the fundamentals. The stock is up 40.7% year to date and 35.0% over the last year, even though it has fallen 5.7% over the past week and 7.7% over the last month. These moves can change how investors think about both risk and opportunity. Recent headlines have discussed Microchip Technology...
